title: Lead SEO Specialist at BikeDekho Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at BikeDekho Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled SEO Specialist looking for your next big career move? BikeDekho Advisory Limited in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
